title: Valkyrian Netherite Reforged V2
description: This is the version 2 of Valkyrian Netehrite Reforged. In the previous one i only retextured sword,pickaxe,axe,shovel and hoe but now i also changed netherite armor + elytra try it!. Join my discord. Report any issue on discord server.
body:
**This is the version 2 of Valkyrian Netehrite Reforged. In the previous one i only retextured sword,pickaxe,axe,shovel and hoe but now i also changed netherite armor + elytra try it!. Join my discord. Report any issue on discord server.**
